work_unit: fix update_quotes stale-clone double-fill (M-003 from audit-2026-07-07-028)
situation: audit-2026-07-07-028 finding M-003-engine: update_quotes clones all open orders upfront at engine.rs:463, then iterates calling attempt_match which mutates self.orders via save_order. When two SUBMITTED orders share a symbol, the second iteration uses the pre-mutation clone (still showing SUBMITTED + full quantity) even though the first fill already reduced available_volume and transitioned the first order to FILLED/PARTIALLY_FILLED. Result: same-symbol double-fill against the same quote volume.
action: Refactored update_quotes to snapshot only order_ids, then re-fetch each order from self.orders at the top of each loop iteration. Added a status re-check after re-fetch so an order filled/cancelled by a prior iteration is skipped. Single-file change in moni-rs/crates/moni-engine/src/engine.rs. cargo check -p moni-engine passed clean.
outcome_evidence: cargo check -p moni-engine finished with no errors; opt-worktree.sh committed + pushed auto/opt-moni-engine-1783358963 to origin (new branch). Fix eliminates stale-clone path: each iteration now reads latest self.orders state post-save_order.
next_suggestion: Next pending derived_fix: MONI-API-002 (unbounded replay/backtest frames ingestion → memory exhaustion DoS, routes.rs:239, route-fix, medium). After that MC-001 (symlink TOCTOU paths.rs:65).

audit_findings.finding: update_quotes clones open orders into Vec<OrderRecord> before iterating; attempt_match mutates self.orders via save_order mid-loop, but subsequent iterations use stale clones. Two SUBMITTED orders on the same symbol → second fill sees original quantity/status despite first fill having consumed volume.
audit_findings.remediation: Snapshot order_ids only; re-get from self.orders at each iteration start; skip if status no longer SUBMITTED|PARTIALLY_FILLED.
